page: Vultr vc2-1c-0.5gb is an entry-level virtual machine belonging to the Cloud Compute server family. It features a single shared vCPU based on the Intel x86_64 architecture, configured with one physical core and one thread. The instance is equipped with 0.5 GB of system memory, providing a memory-to-core ratio of 0.5 GB per vCPU.

Local storage is bundled with the instance, consisting of a 10 GB NVMe SSD. This solid-state storage provides low-latency disk access for basic operating system tasks and small application files. The network configuration includes one complimentary public IPv4 address, allowing direct external connectivity without additional allocation requirements. No dedicated GPU hardware is included in this configuration.

Because the CPU resource is shared, this instance is designed for workloads with low or bursty CPU utilization. The limited 0.5 GB memory capacity restricts its suitability to lightweight administrative tasks, basic web utilities, small cron jobs, or development sandboxes. It represents a highly resource-constrained tier, prioritizing basic functional availability over sustained high-throughput computation.
description: Vultr vc2-1c-0.5gb is an entry-level virtual machine within the Cloud Compute family, designed for lightweight and budget-conscious workloads. It features a single shared Intel x86_64 vCPU with one physical core and one thread, paired with 0.5 GB of system memory. Storage is provided via a bundled 10 GB NVMe SSD, ensuring fast read and write speeds for basic operating system operations. The instance also includes one complimentary public IPv4 address. Due to its shared CPU allocation and highly constrained memory capacity, this server is best suited for low-demand applications such as simple cron jobs, basic utility scripts, minimal web serving, or software development sandboxes. It offers a highly cost-efficient entry point for hosting environments that do not require sustained compute performance or large memory footprints.
og_description: Vultr vc2-1c-0.5gb is an entry-level Cloud Compute server featuring 1 shared Intel x86_64 vCPU, 0.5 GB of RAM, and a 10 GB NVMe SSD, designed for lightweight utility workloads.
meta_description: Vultr vc2-1c-0.5gb is a budget-friendly Cloud Compute instance with 1 shared Intel vCPU, 0.5 GB RAM, and 10 GB NVMe SSD storage.
tagline: A highly constrained, budget-friendly virtual server with shared compute resources and fast local NVMe storage for basic utility workloads.
bullet_points: Single shared Intel x86_64 vCPU for bursty workloads
0.5 GB of system memory for lightweight applications
Bundled 10 GB NVMe SSD local storage
Includes one complimentary public IPv4 address
Best suited for cron jobs, basic utilities, and development sandboxes
